# Let's open and display the text with indices to find spans
path = "/mnt/data/file-JmVMF5bWpPxrsFqnK9U6wJ-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-JmVMF5bWpPxrsFqnK9U6wJ-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

candidates = [
    ("those who do good deeds being rewarded", "Aya"),
    ("the righteous will be given a place of safety", "Aya"),
    ("the righteous will be given a place of security", "Aya"),
    ("the righteous are in the gardens", "Aya"),
    ("a person's deeds are weighed, and if they are good, they are rewarded", "Hadeeth"),
    ("the best among people is the one who benefits others", "Hadeeth"),
    ("Allah will not punish the righteous, but they will be rewarded", "Aya"),
    ("Allah will not destroy the righteous", "Aya"),
]

spans = []
for phrase, typ in candidates:
    start = text.find(phrase)
    if start != -1:
        end = start + len(phrase)
        spans.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": text[start:end], "citation_type": typ})
    else:
        print("Not found:", phrase)

spans, len(text)

for s in spans:
    start, end = s["span_start"], s["span_end"]
    print(text[max(0, start-60):min(len(text), end+60)])
    print("----")
